home.title: What do you want to learn today?

guest.title: Learn Smarter, Not Harder
guest.subtitle: Master any subject with interactive flashcards and smart study tools
guest.featuresTitle: Everything you need to ace your exams
guest.featuresDescription: Simple and effective tools for organizing your learning and memorizing material
guest.feature1Description: Organize your learning material by creating custom subjects with the ability to set exam dates
guest.feature2Description: Build your question bank with detailed answers and explanations for better understanding
guest.feature3Description: Use interactive flashcards for effective memorization and track your progress

instructions.instruction1: View the question on the card
instructions.instruction3: Flip the card over to check yourself
instructions.instruction4: Note how well you remember the answer

about.title: About Study Helper
about.mission: Study Helper is a platform for effective exam preparation. We help students structure their knowledge, memorize material, and successfully pass exams through a convenient flashcard system and organized learning process.
about.whyCreated: The app was created to make learning more systematic and productive, providing simple tools for working with large amounts of information.
about.feature1Description: Create and manage subjects, track exam dates and preparation status (in progress, passed, failed).
about.feature2Description: Add unlimited questions with detailed answers for each subject.
about.feature3Description: Use flashcards for effective memorization with a self-assessment system.
about.feature4Description: Export questions to PDF format for offline study and printing.
about.feature5Description: All your data is protected. Access to materials only after authentication.
about.feature6Description: Full support for Russian and English interface languages.
about.techStack: The application is built on technology stack: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Prisma ORM, NextAuth for secure authentication, and Gravity UI Kit for the interface.
about.openSourceDescription: Study Helper is an open-source project. You can explore the code, suggest improvements, or use it for learning.
